_comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH for Apex pass/lock rates shown on the dashboard. Every % the operator sees must trace to here, and here must trace to a COMMITTED harness (never /tmp). Re-run the harness, update this file, then update any displayed constant. test_apex_validation_provenance.py enforces it.
rule: EOD drawdown (threshold set at daily close + ratchets on EOD-balance highs; intraday equity still liquidates on the downside)
data: real Databento CME NQ 1m resampled to 5m (run_d1c_real.load_1m)

funded_deployed.note: momentum ON funded APPLIED 2026-06-27 (was mm0/68.2%/$1924/$12.3k); P3 cushion brake already live pushes reach-lock toward ~90-98%

retired_fabrications.reason: came from deleted /tmp scripts that modeled the wrong (too-lenient) drawdown rule; not reproducible. The '81% worst year (2024)' claim is triply false: 2024 actually passes 55.8%, no year reaches 81% (best is 2026 at 68.0%), and the real worst year is 2022 (48.3%, bear)

caveats: per-trade give-back proxy is slightly optimistic on the intraday-liquidation leg (true bust could be a touch higher)
funded drawdown TYPE = EOD, CONFIRMED by operator 2026-06-28 (same as eval) -> ~68% reach-lock stands; the ~83% intraday alternative is ruled out
engine validated: apex_eval_validate.py reproduces apex_sim.py exactly (A-only/3MNQ/no-clock = 90.3%)
_INVALIDATED_2026-07-02: AUDIT F1/F3: all pre-2026-07-02 pass/lock/payout numbers in this file were computed with 5m fill-bar target look-ahead (entry-vs-target sequencing unproven) and a short-side MAE sign inversion in the B generators. They are INVALID for certification. Corrected numbers below (tools_1m_truth_recert.py). Funded payout $ additionally pend the Apex 4.0 payout-cap rebuild (audit F5).

recert_1m_truth.method: signals unchanged (causally clean); exits re-walked on real 1m bars; no same-bar target/partial on the 1m fill bar; adverse-first thereafter; F3 sign fix applied

eval_pass_new._fmt: [pass%, bust%]; momentum events still 5m-close-fill (no fill bias) but lane is LIVE-DEAD (audit D1) — mm0 rows describe the current live machine

joint_bracket_2026-07-02.note: audit F4: joint per-bar combined adverse marking vs per-trade proxy — delta is SMALL (legacy exit3/1.5R streams, 5m fills)

phase3_selected_machine._SUPERSEDED_2026-07-02b: DLL UNMODELED — the $1,000 Daily Loss Limit was not applied in this harness. Budget $1,600 allowed single A-trade excursions to cross the DLL. Superseded by dll_recert_selected_machine block (tools_account_size_research.py, budget $1,200, operator DLL verification 2026-07-02).
phase3_selected_machine.config: A10 Exit#3 + D1c ACTIVE_EVAL_FILTER · size-to-risk $1,600/contract-budget (max 10 MNQ) · B OFF · momentum OFF

budget1600 max14: best pass, higher bust; one-knob upgrade
A10/B2 exit3+B-single1: B adds no pass; rejected for simplicity
80pt-cap A10/B0: REJECTED: cap costs ~14pp pass on 1m truth

notes: D1c attach lifts A exit3 to PF 2.306/+184R on kept 435 (dropped 270, keep-rate 62%)
B near-breakeven on 1m truth (PF 1.06-1.08) and adds no eval pass -> removed
momentum stays OFF until warmup engineering + re-certification (audit D1/H)
SINGLE_1R demoted: certified-on-artifact (F2); EXIT3 restored as default

dll_recert_selected_machine.operator_verification: Apex 50K EOD eval enforces $1,000 Daily Loss Limit (official table: $500/$1,000/$1,500/$2,000 for 25K/50K/100K/150K EOD evaluations) — operator confirmed 2026-07-02
dll_recert_selected_machine.config: A10 Exit#3 + D1c ACTIVE_EVAL_FILTER · size-to-risk $1,200/contract-budget (max 10 MNQ) · B OFF · momentum OFF
dll_recert_selected_machine.note: This is the CURRENT LOCKED machine budget as of v2026.07.02b. The prior DLL-free row (phase3_selected_machine, $1,600, pass 57.7%/bust 17.7%) is SUPERSEDED — DLL was unmodeled.

funded_40_recert.rules: Apex 4.0 EOD ladder (6 payouts ~$13k lifetime cap, PA closes), 50% consistency since last payout, 5x$250 qualifying days, $1k DLL — VERIFY vs live contract
funded_40_recert._fmt: [E$ paid lifetime, bust%, median months to ladder-close]
funded_40_recert.recommended_funded_size: A4-A5 (bust 0% observed; A6 trades 2% bust for ~1 month faster extraction)
caveats: monthly rolling starts OVERLAP -> effective independent samples ~4-5, bust% has wide CI
numbers lean on the D1c-kept stream (PF 2.31) — monitor live D1c keep-rate/edge
old funded figures $22.1k/$19.4k INVALID (pre-4.0 uncapped payout model)
